list.name: client_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT client_id FROM clients ORDER BY client_id

targets.rawSql: SELECT fw.window_start AS time, fw.trust, fw.fsm_violation, fw.drift, fw.fleet FROM feature_windows fw JOIN clients c ON c.id = fw.client_id WHERE c.client_id = '$client_id' ORDER BY fw.window_start

SELECT fw.window_start AS time, (fw.features->>'msg_rate')::float AS msg_rate, (fw.features->>'byte_rate')::float AS byte_rate, (fw.features->>'ka_conformance')::float AS ka_conformance, (fw.features->>'topic_entropy')::float AS topic_entropy FROM feature_windows fw JOIN clients c ON c.id = fw.client_id WHERE c.client_id = '$client_id' ORDER BY fw.window_start
SELECT vh.ts AS time, vh.level, vh.reason FROM verdict_history vh JOIN clients c ON c.id = vh.client_id WHERE c.client_id = '$client_id' ORDER BY vh.ts
SELECT i.opened_ts, i.peak_level, i.fsm_diff FROM incidents i JOIN clients c ON c.id = i.client_id WHERE c.client_id = '$client_id' ORDER BY i.opened_ts DESC LIMIT 20
